title: DC-TAP Distal Candidate Target-Gene Perturbation Results

data_urls.description: Final DC-TAP sequence results with chromatin categories
data_urls.access_notes: Raw GitHub-hosted TSV; verify current commit or archive hash for publication.
Use to validate schema and label definitions.

instructions: Download the final results table and column descriptions from the DC-TAP repository.
Pin commit or file hash for reproducible releases.
Validate label definitions, chromatin categories, element-gene distances, and target-gene ubiquity before constructing splits.

recommended_axes.name: element_gene_distance_bin
recommended_axes.definition: Distance-conditioned element-gene deployment axis, e.g. less than 10 kb, 10-to-100 kb, and at least 100 kb.

recommended_axes.name: chromatin_category_match
recommended_axes.definition: Match or stratify chromatin category when testing distance effects.

recommended_axes.name: sequence_overlap_control
recommended_axes.definition: Measure sequence-window overlap between train and evaluation element windows.

useful_for: Testing DNA model representations on distal regulatory deployment settings.
Mechanism follow-up after sequence/composition proxy findings.
leakage_risks: Some columns may encode label-definition or assay-power leakage.
Positive support can collapse under strict matching.
Distance is a deployment proxy and needs controls before model-specific mechanism claims.
